race.description: Allendale Merino Stud Country Boosted Maiden Hcp
race.comment: KNEEL DOWN (11) put the writing on the wall last start with a tough on-pace third over 1300m at Orange. Drawn the inside gate for this and can finally shed his Maiden tag at start fifteen. TERRITORY STYLE (2) resumes after having mixed success in his first campaign. Dropped in trip with a fading fourth over 1000m at Scone last November. Back without a trial and expected to go close. YASENA (5) lightly raced mare resuming after running a string of minor placings last prep. Finished a narrow second over this track and trip last November. Fitted with the one trial and not without top-three claims. BLAZING COURAGE (8) started hard in the market on debut with a fading sixth over 1100m at Dubbo in a much stronger contest. Pulled up with a slow recovery rate on debut and deserves another chance with the claim.
